'''''Dreadnaught-Five''''', called '''''D-Five''''' for short, was the fifth of six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] used on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.

==History==
It came directly from the [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] line for use on the project in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. Before ''Outbound Flight''{{'s}} departure, ''Dreadnaught-Five'' had a minor fuel leak problem.

After the crash, it was used as the home of the settlers of the [[Outbound Flight Colony]]. One of its rooms was the [[AA-7 Fire Control Room]].

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
*[[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)|''Outbound Flight'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Survivor's Quest (abridged audiobook)|''Survivor's Quest'' abridged audiobook]]
